name: Peach Crepes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine flour and make a well in the center. Add egg to the well.
2. Whisk together creamer and milk. Pour into the flour mixture while whisking.
3. Whisk in nutmeg and vanilla until smooth.
4. Cover the batter and set aside for 30 minutes.
5. Preheat a nonstick pan over medium-high heat for 1 minute. Spray with nonstick spray twice.
6. Pour enough batter into the pan to form a thin layer covering the bottom, about 3 tablespoons. Tilt the pan to spread the batter evenly.
7. Cook for 1-2 minutes until the edges firm up and start to lift from the bottom of the pan. Gently flip the crepe and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes on the other side. Remove to a sheet of waxed paper.
8. Repeat steps 5-7 until all crepes are cooked.
9. In a frying pan, combine orange juice, Grand Marnier, peaches, and honey. Cook for 10 minutes until the liquid thickens into syrup.
10. To assemble, place each crepe on a plate. Arrange about one-third of the peach slices on the bottom half of the crepe and fold the top half over. Drizzle with a tablespoon of syrup and sprinkle with cinnamon and orange peel.
